# Oladimeji Abubakar

> Oladimeji Abubakar is an independent product designer based in Kwara, Nigeria, working with teams worldwide.

Oladimeji designs intuitive digital products, scalable interface systems, and functional prototypes across B2C, SaaS, fintech, healthcare, and marketplace products.

## Canonical website

- [Portfolio](https://uxdimeji.com/): Selected work, approach, profile, and contact details.
- [Sitemap](https://uxdimeji.com/sitemap.xml): Canonical index of public pages and case studies.

## Expertise

- Product strategy
- UX and interaction design
- Interface and design systems
- Functional prototyping and builds
